violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives stored as clean) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were places in 3-compartment sink to be cleaned before next use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

Pork rinds packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Pork rinds to be labeled. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2025

Frozen bananas packaged in the food establishment are lacking proper labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Firm to submit labels to inspector. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. At time of arrival, food was being prepared, and no certified food safety manager was on-site. CFSM arrived after being called. Establishment to enroll additional employees in a food safety manager course or ensure that one of their certified food safety managers are on-site at all times food is being prepared, handled, or served. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

Food contact surface of equipment/utensils (ice machine chute in direct contact with ice) was observed with an accumulation of debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine chute to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2024

Several containers of beef, beans, and chicken were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Per Person in Charge, food was prepared 2 days ago. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

Containers of pesticides not approved for use in food establishments was observed in the restroom. Pesticides were removed from the premises during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

Chocolate dipped frozen bananas (with nuts) and a frozen dairy product packaged in the food establishment and which are available for consumer self-service, are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

A rack of uncovered bread loaves was observed stored in an area accessible to customers. Food must be stored as to protect it from environmental contamination. Bread was relocated to food storage area in the back during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
The door to the toilet room which opens up into the food prep area is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 01/02/2025

The wall behind a mixer on a prep table is constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the single-use container storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Employee clothing was relocated at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024
